title: Upload Posts - Upload Videos to Social Media
h1: Upload to all platforms with one click
bodyText: Upload Post Users API Keys Upload Calendar Analytics Pricing Docs 👑 Manual Shorts Uploader Upload to all platforms with one click Manually upload content to multiple social media platforms at once. As you configure your upload, the equivalent cURL command is generated below — copy it into automation workflows with tools like n8n or Make. For full automation, use our API and enjoy all params and options. Need a head start? Browse ready-made workflow templates at upload-post.com/n8n-templates. Set up core content Pick the profile, content source, and primary copy. Media pending Select Profile Content will be posted using this profile's connected accounts. xkksLA9bPvHLwx4nThvU Connected: tiktok, facebook, instagram, x, youtube, linkedin, threads, pinterest, bluesky Select Upload Method Upload Media File Use Media URL(s) Text-Only Post Upload Media File Images, Videos or Documents (LinkedIn) Title Optional — used as caption/description AI copy: Generate now Add a photo or video first. Generate on upload Generate now: preview and edit the copy before publishing. Generate on upload: the server generates it at publish time (you'll see autogenerate=true in the cURL). This Title is a global field used across all platforms during upload. By default, it also serves as the description/caption when a platform-specific description is not provided. Mind that each network has different character limits and rules — see the character limit requirements. You can override per platform via fields like instagram_title, instagram_description, youtube_title, linkedin_title, facebook_description, etc. First Comment (Optional) Works on: Instagram, Facebook, Threads, Bluesky, Reddit, X, YouTube, and LinkedIn. Platform-specific settings Enable each network and fine-tune channel options. None selected Select Platforms Choose where to upload TikTok @nick_lorance Instagram @nicklorance7 YouTube @Zakaria 11 LinkedIn @Nick Lorance Facebook @Nick Lorance X @nick lorance Threads @Nick Lorance Pinterest @nicklorance7 Not connected Reddit Bluesky @nicklorance.bsky.social Not connected Google Business Not connected Discord Not connected Telegram Scheduling & submission Choose when to publish and finalize the request. Immediate Async upload If enabled, uploads are queued and processed asynchronously. Schedule Post (Optional) Leave blank to post immediately Enter the date and time you want to post. Timezone Your timezone America/New_York America/Chicago America/Denver America/Los_Angeles America/Anchorage America/Phoenix America/Toronto America/Vancouver America/Mexico_City America/Sao_Paulo America/Argentina/Buenos_Aires America/Lima America/Bogota America/Santiago America/Caracas Pacific/Honolulu Pacific/Auckland Pacific/Fiji Europe/London Europe/Paris Europe/Berlin Europe/Madrid Europe/Rome Europe/Amsterdam Europe/Brussels Europe/Vienna Europe/Zurich Europe/Stockholm Europe/Oslo Europe/Copenhagen Europe/Warsaw Europe/Prague Europe/Budapest Europe/Athens Europe/Helsinki Europe/Bucharest Europe/Moscow Europe/Istanbul Europe/Lisbon Europe/Dublin Europe/Kiev Asia/Tokyo Asia/Shanghai Asia/Hong_Kong Asia/Singapore Asia/Seoul Asia/Taipei Asia/Bangkok Asia/Jakarta Asia/Manila Asia/Kolkata Asia/Dubai Asia/Riyadh Asia/Tel_Aviv Asia/Jerusalem Asia/Karachi Asia/Dhaka Asia/Kuala_Lumpur Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh Australia/Sydney Australia/Melbourne Australia/Brisbane Australia/Perth Australia/Adelaide Africa/Cairo Africa/Johannesburg Africa/Lagos ✓ Africa/Nairobi Africa/Casablanca Atlantic/Reykjavik Atlantic/Canary UTC Etc/GMT Your scheduled time will be interpreted in this timezone. OR Add to Queue Automatically schedule to your next available queue slot. Configure queue Upload Video to 0 Platforms Post preview xkksLA9bPvHLwx4nThvU No platforms selected Post immediately Async · Attached File TITLE No title set Add media to see preview UploadPost Your API solution for all social media platforms. Simplifying content management for developers and creators.
